title: KAMaster Stainless Steel Grill Grate Lifter Gripper, Grate Grabber with Green Protective Cover for Big Green Egg, Primo, Kamado, Weber, Louisiana Kamado, LifeSmart and Other Smokers
features: ✿Easy To Lift The Grate - The grid gripper is good helper to clamp cooking utensils.It is necessary accessories for Big Grill Green Egg,Primo,Kamado Grill Joe,Weber,Louisiana Kamado,LifeSmart and other smoker.Use caution when handling any hot surfaces and you'd better use it with two hands.

✿304 Stainless Steel - The update grate lifter is marked with 304 stainless steel,heavy duty grill lifter,more tough and durable,not easily deformed,never rust.Grid gripper,be the best choice for health and environmental protection.

✿Durable and Safe Handle - This grill grate gripper' handle with protective,it can effectively prevent rust and has a certain anti scalding effect.The special handle feel better and it won't slide out of your hand,do not leave fingerprints.（Gloves are recommended for high temperature operation.）
✿Necessary Green Egg Accessories - The update grate lifter can clamp the grid more tighter and you can easily take up the grate with it just use one hand.Essential BBQ accessories or kitchen helper.

✿Widely Used and Convenient - You can use it to lift the hot grate,bowl,dish,plate roasting pan from grill,oven,pressure cooker, microwave etc.Pick up hot soup or extremely hot plates with ease;The gripper won't let you down or spill anything when used correctly.There is no slippage when plates or bowls are gripped.
description: KAMaster Stainless Steel Grill Grate Lifter Gripper,Grate Grabber with Green Protective Cover
